dimension: Luminaries/Signals - rerun bible-EBM backtest at final config
reason_not_run: Script uses hardcoded TICKERS universe that does NOT match the final 8-token universe. CLI exposes only --n_configs, --top_k, --windows (no --tokens, no --cost_bps). Per task instructions (step 4), universe mismatch should be reported without modifying the script.

required_changes_to_align_with_final_con: Replace hardcoded TICKERS=['BTC','ETH','SOL','BONK','DOGE','FLOKI','PEPE'] with the final 8-token universe ['SOL','WIF','BONK','PEPE','POPCAT','DOGE','FLOKI','JTO'] (line 39).
Add a --tokens CLI flag (comma-separated) overriding TICKERS so backtests can be parameterized without code edits.
Add a --cost_bps CLI flag overriding COST_BPS=40 (line 45).
Verify that binance has USDT pairs for WIF, POPCAT, JTO (load_bars_by_sym skips missing markets silently on line 67-68); some of these only listed late 2023 / 2024 and may truncate windows.
Once universe matches, re-run: cd /Users/lekt9/Projects/unify && PYTHONPATH=src uv run python -u .fib-harness-v2.4/jesus_loop_pair_daily.py --n_configs 300 --top_k 10 --windows 7
repair_hint.do_not_modify: Per L4-4a task directive, this agent did NOT modify the script. Repair handoff to an agent with code-change authority for this script.

prior_results_from_existing_report.note: These results are from the 7-token (BTC/ETH/SOL/BONK/DOGE/FLOKI/PEPE), 5-window, 300-config, top_k=10, 1d-bar run. They are NOT the final-config results requested.

H2_bible_high_vs_ew_win_rate.note: Even if scaled to 7-window run, 2/5 = 40% win rate fails the >=3/7 (43%) threshold; bible-HIGH is below EW in majority of windows in prior data.

H3_strategy_vs_sol_hodl.note: Prior report does not include a SOL-HODL benchmark lane. The script's lanes are: rank_train_sharpe, rank_composite, rank_bible_low_energy, rank_bible_high_energy, equal_weight. No per-asset HODL baseline is computed.

rationale: Script universe does not match final 8-token universe; cannot produce final-config backtest without code modification.
On prior 7-token data, bible-HIGH mean holdout Sharpe (0.25) is BELOW equal-weight (0.59), and bible-HIGH only beats EW in 2/5 windows (minority).
H2 fails: bible-HIGH vs EW win rate 2/5 < required 3/7.
H3 cannot be evaluated because the script does not emit a SOL-HODL lane.
overall_assessment.recommendation: BLOCKING until (a) script is parameterized to accept the final 8-token universe, (b) a SOL-HODL benchmark lane is added, and (c) the rerun produces bible-HIGH mean Sharpe > EW in majority of windows. Current signal does not support bible-EBM ranking as alpha over equal-weight.
